content.cn_text: 你将听到几段不同的录音，并需要根据所听内容回答问题。
content.en_text: You will hear a number of different recordings, and you will have to answer questions on what

content.cn_text: 你所听到的内容。
content.en_text: you hear.

content.cn_text: 你会有时间阅读说明和题目，也会有机会
content.en_text: There will be time for you to read the instructions and questions, and you will have a chance to

content.cn_text: 检查你的答案。
content.en_text: check your work.

content.cn_text: 所有录音只播放一遍。
content.en_text: All the recordings will be played once only.

content.cn_text: 考试分为四个部分。
content.en_text: The test is in four sections.

content.cn_text: 请将所有答案写在听力题册上。
content.en_text: Write all your answers in the listening question booklet.

content.cn_text: 考试结束时，你将有十分钟时间把答案誊写到
content.en_text: At the end of the test, you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to an

content.cn_text: 答题卡上。
content.en_text: answer sheet.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到题册第2页第一部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section one on page two of your question booklet.

content.cn_text: 你将听到两位朋友 John 和 Anna 交谈，内容是 Anna 刚刚
content.en_text: You will hear two friends called John and Anna talking about a holiday Anna has just

content.cn_text: 在 Jackson Island 度过的假期。
content.en_text: had on Jackson Island.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第2页第1至第7题。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions one to seven on page two.

content.cn_text: 你会看到已经为你完成了一个例题。
content.en_text: You will see that there is an example that has been done for you.

content.cn_text: 只有这一次，与例题相关的对话会先播放。
content.en_text: On this occasion only, the conversation relating to this will be played first.

content.cn_text: John：嗨，Anna，你去 Jackson Island 的假期怎么样？
content.en_text: John: Hi Anna, how was your holiday to Jackson Island?

content.cn_text: Anna：挺好的。
content.en_text: Anna: It was good.

content.cn_text: 那里有很多可看的东西。
content.en_text: There's quite a lot to see.

content.cn_text: 它确实是个挺大的岛。
content.en_text: It's quite a big island, really.

content.cn_text: John：是啊。
content.en_text: John: Yeah.

content.cn_text: 我在考虑夏天去，所以你推荐岛上哪些地方？
content.en_text: I was thinking of going in the summer, so where would you recommend going on the island?

content.cn_text: Anna：当然是首都 Camford。
content.en_text: Anna: Well, the capital, of course, Camford.

content.cn_text: 我在那里住在我表亲家。
content.en_text: I stayed there with my cousin.

content.cn_text: Anna 住在她表亲家，所以空格中已经填入 cousin。
content.en_text: Anna stayed with her cousin, so cousin has been written in the space.

content.cn_text: 现在正式开始。
content.en_text: Now we shall begin.

content.cn_text: 你需要边听边答题，因为录音不会
content.en_text: You should answer the questions as you listen, because you will not hear the recording

content.cn_text: 播放第二遍。
content.en_text: in a second time.

content.cn_text: 请仔细听，并回答第1至第7题。
content.en_text: Listen carefully and answer questions one to seven.

content.cn_text: John：嗨，Anna，你去 Jackson Island 的假期怎么样？
content.en_text: John: Hi Anna, how was your holiday to Jackson Island?

content.cn_text: Anna：挺好的。
content.en_text: Anna: It was good.

content.cn_text: 那里有很多可看的东西。
content.en_text: There's quite a lot to see.

content.cn_text: 它确实是个挺大的岛。
content.en_text: It's quite a big island, really.

content.cn_text: John：是啊。
content.en_text: John: Yeah.

content.cn_text: 我在考虑夏天去，所以你推荐岛上哪些地方？
content.en_text: I was thinking of going in the summer, so where would you recommend going on the island?

content.cn_text: Anna：当然是首都 Camford。
content.en_text: Anna: Well, the capital, of course, Camford.

content.cn_text: 我在那里住在我表亲家。
content.en_text: I stayed there with my cousin.

content.cn_text: John：你在那里做了什么？
content.en_text: John: What did you do there?

content.cn_text: Anna：其实我大部分时间都在那里购物。
content.en_text: Anna: Well, actually I spent most of my time there shopping.

content.cn_text: John：那儿有不错的购物中心吗？
content.en_text: John: So has it got good shopping centres?

content.cn_text: Anna：有，但其实和家里的差不多。
content.en_text: Anna: Yes, but they're the same as at home, really.

content.cn_text: 所以我所有购物都在市场里完成，那里很棒。
content.en_text: So I did all my shopping in the market, which is great.

content.cn_text: John：那里买什么东西比较好？
content.en_text: John: What kinds of things are good to buy there?

content.cn_text: Anna：什么都可以买，尤其是包和鞋。
content.en_text: Anna: Everything, but bags and shoes, especially.

content.cn_text: 只是一定要带现金，因为大多数摊位不收信用卡。
content.en_text: Just make sure you've got cash with you, as most of the stalls don't take credit cards.

content.cn_text: John：好的，这个信息很有用。
content.en_text: John: Okay, that's good to know.

content.cn_text: 你还去了哪里？
content.en_text: Where else did you go?

content.cn_text: Anna：我和表亲去了 Newtown。
content.en_text: Anna: Well, my cousin and I went to Newtown.

content.cn_text: 她说那里以现代建筑闻名。
content.en_text: She said it was famous for its modern architecture.

content.cn_text: 我们在那里只有半天时间，所以坐了观光巴士游览小镇。
content.en_text: We only had half a day there, so we took a bus tour around the town.

content.cn_text: 但如果我是你，我会跳过这个巴士游。
content.en_text: But if I were you, I'd give the bus tour a miss.

content.cn_text: 除非你很懂建筑，否则那些建筑看起来都差不多。
content.en_text: Unless you know a lot about architecture, the buildings all look the same.

content.cn_text: 不过那里有个博物馆。
content.en_text: There's a museum, though.

content.cn_text: 据说很不错。
content.en_text: That's supposed to be good.

content.cn_text: 你可能会喜欢那个。
content.en_text: You might like that.

content.cn_text: John：好的，我会去试试。
content.en_text: John: Okay, I'll give it a go.

content.cn_text: Anna：之后我们去了 Golden Beach，因为我们打算去见一位
content.en_text: Anna: Then after that, we headed for Golden Beach, because we were going to meet up with an

content.cn_text: 我多年没见的老朋友。
content.en_text: old friend that I hadn't seen for years.

content.cn_text: 但我们不得不住在房车里，因为酒店全都订满了。
content.en_text: But we had to stay in a caravan, as the hotels were all booked up.

content.cn_text: John：它像宣传册上看起来那么漂亮吗？
content.en_text: John: Is it as pretty as it looks in the brochures?

content.cn_text: Anna：是的，非常风景如画。
content.en_text: Anna: Yes, it's very picturesque.

content.cn_text: 我们在非常美丽的蓝色海面上进行了帆船运动。
content.en_text: We did some sailing on the most beautiful blue sea.

content.cn_text: 海水非常清澈，即使离岸很远也能看到海底。
content.en_text: It was so clear that you could see the bottom, even quite far out to sea.

content.cn_text: 那一段旅程非常棒，我真希望能住得更久。
content.en_text: That part of the trip was great, and I'd have liked to have stayed even longer.

content.cn_text: 如果我是你，我建议在那里至少住四天。
content.en_text: I'd suggest staying there for a minimum of four days if I were you.

content.cn_text: 我们在那里只住了两天，远远不够。
content.en_text: We had two days there, and it wasn't nearly enough.

content.cn_text: John：听起来很棒。
content.en_text: John: Sounds great.

content.cn_text: 我会把它列入必做清单。
content.en_text: I'll put that on my must-do list.

content.cn_text: 那就是你旅行的最后一站了吗？
content.en_text: Was that the end of your trip?

content.cn_text: Anna：不是。
content.en_text: Anna: No.

content.cn_text: 在 Golden Beach 之后，我们开车去了岛中心的White Mountain。
content.en_text: After Golden Beach, we drove into the centre of the island to White Mountain.

content.cn_text: John：White 是颜色那个 white 吗？
content.en_text: John: White as in the colour?

content.cn_text: Anna：是的。
content.en_text: Anna: Yes.

content.cn_text: 这个岛很棒，因为你可以从海滩出发，几个小时内就到达白雪覆盖的山上。
content.en_text: The island's great, because you can go from the beaches up to the snowy mountain in a couple

content.cn_text: 只需要几个小时。
content.en_text: of hours.

content.cn_text: 我们带了帐篷，因为原本打算露营，但天气太冷了。
content.en_text: We took a tent because we were going to camp, but the weather was so cold.

content.cn_text: 事实上，我在那里时正在下雪，所以我们改住了汽车旅馆。
content.en_text: In fact, it was snowing when I was there, that we stopped in a motel instead.

content.cn_text: John：那你们去滑雪了吗？
content.en_text: John: Did you go skiing then?

content.cn_text: Anna：没有。
content.en_text: Anna: No.

content.cn_text: 但我们尝试了单板滑雪，它比看起来难。
content.en_text: But we tried snowboarding, and it was harder than it looked.

content.cn_text: 看别人做的时候好像很简单，但我花了很久才
content.en_text: It looked so easy when you see other people doing it, but it took me ages to get the

content.cn_text: 掌握窍门。
content.en_text: hang of it.

content.cn_text: 我真希望自己上过课，但课程必须提前预订。
content.en_text: I wish I'd had some lessons, but you had to make your bookings in advance.

content.cn_text: John：好的，我会了解一下，谢谢。
content.en_text: John: OK, I'll look into that, thanks.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间浏览
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions

content.cn_text: 第2页第8至第10题。
content.en_text: 8 to 10 on page 2.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第8至第10题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 8 to 10.

content.cn_text: John：那你还有其他建议可以给我吗？
content.en_text: John: So are there any other tips or advice you could give me?

content.cn_text: Anna：我想想。
content.en_text: Anna: I don't know.

content.cn_text: 哦，有个地方你应该去看看，是一家非常古雅的咖啡馆，在山脚下。
content.en_text: Oh, one place you should try to visit is this very quaint cafe, which is at the foot

content.cn_text: 就在山脚。
content.en_text: of the mountain.

content.cn_text: 那里有最好吃的蛋糕。
content.en_text: It has the best cakes ever.

content.cn_text: 光为了它们去那里都值得。
content.en_text: It's worth going there just for them.

content.cn_text: John：那我一定要尝尝。
content.en_text: John: I'll have to try those.

content.cn_text: 那你还有什么建议？
content.en_text: So what other advice would you give?

content.cn_text: Anna：哦，让我想想。
content.en_text: Anna: Oh, let me think.

content.cn_text: 我们其实没遇到什么问题。
content.en_text: We didn't really have any problems.

content.cn_text: John：那你们在那里是怎么出行的？
content.en_text: John: Well, how did you get around when you were there?

content.cn_text: Anna：我们一开始想租摩托车。
content.en_text: Anna: We wanted to get a motorbike at first.

content.cn_text: 摩托车租起来很便宜，而且路况很好，骑起来很有趣，但结果证明
content.en_text: They're very cheap to hire and great fun to ride as the roads are very good, but it turned

content.cn_text: 这不是个好主意，因为天气变化太大。
content.en_text: out not to be a good idea because the weather is so changeable.

content.cn_text: 你最好租一辆汽车。
content.en_text: You'd be much better off in a car.

content.cn_text: 那里有很多地方可以租车，而且道路标识很清楚，
content.en_text: There are plenty of places where you can hire them, and the roads are well signposted,

content.cn_text: 所以你不会迷路。
content.en_text: so you won't get lost.

content.cn_text: John：那我大概可以到那里之后买一张地图吧。
content.en_text: John: And presumably I can get a map when I get there.

content.cn_text: Anna：可以买，但那里很贵。
content.en_text: Anna: Well, you can, but they are expensive.

content.cn_text: 最好在出发前就在这里买一张。
content.en_text: It'd be better to get one here before you go.

content.cn_text: John：太好了。
content.en_text: John: Great.

content.cn_text: 真的很有用。
content.en_text: Really useful.

content.cn_text: 谢谢你。
content.en_text: Thank you.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–7

items.title: need to take 1. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问在 Camford 的 market 需要带什么，原文说 make sure you've got cash，因为摊位不收信用卡。shopping centres、market、bags and shoes 都不是此空答案。

items.title: visit the 2. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Anna 推荐在 Newtown visit the ______，原文说 bus tour 不推荐，转而推荐 museum，所以答案是 museum。

items.title: in a 3. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 Anna 在 Golden Beach 住在 in a ______，原文说 stay in a caravan，所以答案是 caravan。hotels booked up 是原因，不是答案。
答案解析：第4题在 Golden Beach 的 Things Anna did，原文说 did some sailing，所以答案是 sailing。

items.title: stay for at least 5. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 stay for at least ______，原文建议 minimum of four days。two days 是 Anna 实际停留时间，不是推荐答案。
答案解析：第6题是地点名称，原文说 drove into the centre of the island to White Mountain，所以答案是 White Mountain。

items.title: went 7. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 went ______，John 先问 skiing，但 Anna 否定后说 tried snowboarding，所以答案是 snowboarding。skiing 是干扰。

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Holiday on Jackson Island

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 8–10

items.title: Try the 8. __________ at the cafe on the mountain.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 Try the ______ at the cafe on the mountain，原文说 the best cakes ever，所以答案是 cakes。

items.title: Hire a 9. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 Hire a ______，原文先说 motorbike 不是好主意，随后推荐 much better off in a car，所以答案是 car。

items.title: Buy a 10. __________ before the holiday
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 Buy a ______ before the holiday，原文围绕 map 展开，并说最好 before you go 买，所以答案是 map。

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
More Advice
• Try the $8$ at the cafe on the mountain.
• Hire a $9$
• Buy a $10$ before the holiday

source_label: 🍠@Listening 永不虾滑 · 仅供个人学习
source_credit: 此内容由🍠@Listening 永不虾滑整理，仅作为分享供个人使用；禁止商用、倒卖和引流。有问题请先仔细看🍠这个账号的置顶和分享贴。没有团队，不是机构，纯个人分享。督学和其他相关课程请咨询主页另一个号@心情有点虾滑（不回任何机经相关消息）。
